title: Workshop
description: Build logs, prototype records, material notes, and engineering process documentation.

items.title: Mechanical keyboard - ISO layout
items.summary: Custom 65% build with brass weight, hand-lubed switches, gasket mount. Rev 02 addresses flex.

items.title: Terminal dashboard - system monitor
items.summary: Mono-only interface displaying CPU, memory, disk, and process state. Operational aesthetics.

items.title: PowerLabs - battery management prototype
items.summary: Rev 03 BMS board. Balancing circuit redesign, thermal characterisation under Nigerian grid conditions.

items.title: Material selection principles
items.summary: Rules for choosing material when the process is visible: aluminium, brass, PCB, felt as design objects.
